sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
The Traditional Beer (Repeal) [No. 17 of /2011 225
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 17 of 2011
Date of Assent: 12th April, 2011
An Act to repeal the Traditional Beer Act, 1930
[15th April, 2011
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia.
Enactment
This Act may be cited as the Traditional Beer (Repeal) Short title
Act, 2011.
(1) The Traditional Beer Act, 1930, is hereby repealed. :Repeal of
Cap. 168
(2) Notwithstanding subsection (1), a person who immediately Act No. 11
of 1930
before the commencement of this Act, held a permit to manufacture,
process or sell traditional beer shall hold such permit for a period
of three months, or for such extended period as the Minister may
determine, after which that person shall apply for a liquor licence
under the provisions of the Liquor Licensing Act, 2011. ;;Act No. 20
nIsf. 2011
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government'Brinter,
P.O. Box 30136, 1010 Lusaka Price KI,000 each
